title: thelypteris pilosa var. major
intro: Thelypteris pilosa var. major, also known as the hairy maiden fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Thelypteris pilosa var. major include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
